Package com.irurueta.units

Class TemperatureConverter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.TemperatureConverter
  • public class TemperatureConverter
extends java.lang.Object
    Does temperature conversions to different units. To prevent loss of accuracy, conversion should only be done as a final step before displaying temperature measurements.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      static double ABSOLUTE_ZERO
      Absolute zero temperature expressed in Kelvins (K).

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description
      private TemperatureConverter()
      Constructor.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static double celsiusToFahrenheit​(double celsius)
      Converts provided Celsius value to Fahrenheit.
      static double celsiusToKelvin​(double celsius)
      Converts provided Celsius value to Kelvin.
      static double convert​(double input, TemperatureUnit inputUnit, TemperatureUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a temperature value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static void convert​(Temperature input, Temperature output)
      Converts a temperature to provided output temperature unit.
      static void convert​(Temperature temperature, TemperatureUnit outputUnit)
      Converts and updates a temperature to requested output unit.
      static void convert​(Temperature input, TemperatureUnit outputUnit, Temperature result)
      Converts a temperature to requested output unit.
      static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input, TemperatureUnit inputUnit, TemperatureUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a temperature value from input unit to provided output unit.
      static Temperature convertAndReturnNew​(Temperature input, TemperatureUnit outputUnit)
      Converts a temperature to requested output unit.
      static double fahrenheitToCelsius​(double fahrenheit)
      Converts provided Fahrenheit value to Celsius.
      static double kelvinToCelsius​(double kelvin)
      Converts provided Kelvin value to Celsius.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

        Constructor. Prevents instantiation of helper class.

    • Method Detail

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Temperature input,
                           Temperature output)
        Converts a temperature to provided output temperature unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input temperature to be converted.
        output - output temperature where result will be stored and containing output unit.

      • convertAndReturnNew

        public static Temperature convertAndReturnNew​(Temperature input,
                                              TemperatureUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a temperature to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input temperature to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        Returns:
        converted temperature.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Temperature temperature,
                           TemperatureUnit outputUnit)
        Converts and updates a temperature to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        temperature - input temperature to be converted and updated.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.

      • convert

        public static void convert​(Temperature input,
                           TemperatureUnit outputUnit,
                           Temperature result)
        Converts a temperature to requested output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - input temperature to be converted.
        outputUnit - requested output unit.
        result - temperature unit where result will be stored.

      • convert

        public static java.lang.Number convert​(java.lang.Number input,
                                       TemperatureUnit inputUnit,
                                       TemperatureUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a temperature value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - temperature value.
        inputUnit - input temperature unit.
        outputUnit - output temperature unit.
        Returns:
        converted temperature value.

      • convert

        public static double convert​(double input,
                             TemperatureUnit inputUnit,
                             TemperatureUnit outputUnit)
        Converts a temperature value from input unit to provided output unit.
        Parameters:
        input - temperature value.
        inputUnit - input temperature unit.
        outputUnit - output temperature unit.
        Returns:
        converted temperature value.

      • kelvinToCelsius

        public static double kelvinToCelsius​(double kelvin)
        Converts provided Kelvin value to Celsius.
        Parameters:
        kelvin - kelvin value.
        Returns:
        some amount of temperature converted to Celsius.

      • celsiusToKelvin

        public static double celsiusToKelvin​(double celsius)
        Converts provided Celsius value to Kelvin.
        Parameters:
        celsius - celsius value.
        Returns:
        some amount of temperature converted to Kelvin.

      • celsiusToFahrenheit

        public static double celsiusToFahrenheit​(double celsius)
        Converts provided Celsius value to Fahrenheit.
        Parameters:
        celsius - celsius value.
        Returns:
        some amount of temperature converted to Fahrenheit.

      • fahrenheitToCelsius

        public static double fahrenheitToCelsius​(double fahrenheit)
        Converts provided Fahrenheit value to Celsius.
        Parameters:
        fahrenheit - fahrenheit value.
        Returns:
        some amount of temperature converted to Celsius.
